title: sophora rotundifolia
intro: Sophora rotundifolia, also known as the Roundleaf Sophora or Round-leaved Sophora, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family, Fabaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Sophora rotundifolia include improving digestion, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
